args: import struct; import hashlib; import hmac; f=open('enc.db','rb+'); buf=bytearray(f.read()); db_salt=buf[8:40]; uc=struct.unpack('<I', buf[72:76])[0]; ublock_sz=uc*152; users=buf[76:76+ublock_sz]; mac_key=hashlib.blake2b(db_salt+buf[72:76+ublock_sz], digest_size=32).digest(); fc_offset=76+ublock_sz; fc=struct.unpack('<I', buf[fc_offset:fc_offset+4])[0]; p=fc_offset+4; file1_idx=p+92-4; buf[file1_idx:file1_idx+4]=b'\x00\x00\x00\x00'; global_mac=hmac.new(mac_key, buf[72:], hashlib.sha512).digest()[:32]; buf[40:72]=global_mac; f.seek(0); f.write(buf); f.close();
